title: nigella arvensis subsp. aristata
intro: Nigella arvensis subsp. aristata, also known as fiddleneck, is a plant species that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Nigella arvensis subsp. aristata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
